comments.text: From a cursory look on "PRIME CHAINS AND PRATT TREES, 2010" by K. Ford, S. V. Konyagin and F. Luca, it seems that they have either settled this conjecture or have settled another conjecture from [EGPS90]. However, their result might help to solve other related conjectures. Here is the link to the paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/0904.0473 (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
